comments.overrides: Pin emnapi in rolldown's wasm32-wasi fallback binding. It depends on emnapi via both an exact pin (1.10.0) and a range (^1.7.1), which macOS and Linux npm dedupe to different versions, desyncing the lockfile and breaking `npm ci` in CI. Pinning collapses both paths to one version on every OS. This wasm binding is an unused fallback (real platforms use native bindings).
